name: codegraph-auto-sync
description: Auto-syncs .codegraph/ index after any JS/TS/Python file edit. Walks up to find the nearest .codegraph/ directory and runs `codegraph sync` against it.
command: DIR=$(dirname "$FILE_PATH"); while [ "$DIR" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$DIR/.codegraph" ]; do DIR=$(dirname "$DIR"); done; if [ -d "$DIR/.codegraph" ]; then (cd "$DIR" && codegraph sync 2>&1 | tail -3); fi
applies_to: any project that has a .codegraph/ directory
